docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-17-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID YANG. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT JACINTO, VILLA TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT GABRIEL, LUISITO JUDGEMENT IS IN FAVOR OF LUISITO GABRIEL AND AGAINST VILLA JACINTO IN THE AMOUNT OF $0.00, THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF JAN-17-2014. EXHIBITS ARE ORDERED RETURNED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JUDGE PRO TEM JASON JUNGREIS, CLERK WESLEY RAMIREZ. DEPT 525. NOTHING REPORTED. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JACINTO, VILLA AS TO DEFENDANT GABRIEL, LUISITO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACINTO, VILLA AS TO DEFENDANT GABRIEL, LUISITO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED - SERVED DEC-09-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GABRIEL, LUISITO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACINTO, VILLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GABRIEL, LUISITO $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2014 - JUDGMENT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-19-2014 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2014 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. LUISITO GABRIEL DOES NOT OWE VILLA JACINTO ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF JAN-17-2014. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JUDGE PRO TEM JASON JUNGREIS, CLERK WESLEY RAMIREZ. DEPT 525. NOTHING REPORTED.
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF JACINTO, VILLA
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT GABRIEL, LUISITO MAILED TO RESPONDENT JACINTO, VILLA
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY JACINTO, VILLA GABRIEL, LUISITO
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID YANG. FILED BY JACINTO, VILLA GABRIEL, LUISITO
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR MAR-19-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: JUDGE PRO TEM JASON JUNGREIS, CLERK WESLEY RAMIREZ, NOTHING ON RECORD, DEPT 525.
CAUSE CALLED FOR SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL. APPELLANT, LUISITO GABRIEL, APPEARS IN PRO PER. RESPONDENT, VILLA JACINTO APPEARS IN PRO PER. RESPONDENT, PARTIES, PREVIOUSLY SWORN, TESTIFY IN THE NARRATIVE AND RESPOND TO QUESTIONS FROM JUDGE JUNGREIS.

MATTER IS SUBMITTED

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-17-2014 Judgment Entered
